theme: harvest job board posts per-field picking rates
title: Harvest Job Board: Posted Picking Rates
strategies: trivial: post one flat rate on every field, ignoring difficulty, deadline and who is arriving when (checker baseline)
greedy: post a rate proportional to each field's own difficulty -- a plausible piece-rate menu that still gets cherry-picked by whoever arrives first

strong: reformulate as an assignment problem (target-worker matching by true surplus, deadline-eligibility filtered) and price each field at the minimum rate that clears its assigned worker's reservation
headroom above strong: model that earlier, cheaper-cost-than-expected workers might defect onto a planned field and re-solve the matching/pricing jointly instead of once
